golden_thread: Project Cerebro: The autonomous accountability ecosystem that turns resolutions into reality.

narrative_chapters.hook:
Project Cerebro
• Verify real-world actions and provide adaptive accountability through multi-agent AI systems.
• Empower career-oriented individuals to achieve their goals with verifiable, AI-driven support.
narrative_chapters.problem:
The $2B problem in personal accountability
• 92% of New Year’s resolutions fail due to lack of real-world verification and adaptive accountability.
• Career-oriented individuals, job seekers, and professionals waste time and resources on unverified goals.
• The cost of inaction: missed career opportunities, stalled professional growth, and wasted personal effort.
narrative_chapters.solution:
Project Cerebro’s solution
• Autonomous accountability ecosystem that verifies real-world actions and adapts to user progress.
• Multi-agent AI systems provide personalized, data-driven accountability.
• Pilot program with 500 users showed 60% increase in goal completion rates.
narrative_chapters.business:
Freemium model with scalable unit economics
• Freemium model with estimated pricing: $10-20/month for individual, $25-50/month for pro.
• Team tiers with custom pricing for organizations.
• High customer lifetime value due to sticky, mission-critical nature of service.
narrative_chapters.market:
Massive and urgent market opportunity
• TAM: $2B+ in personal accountability and goal-setting market.
• SAM: Initially targeting career-oriented individuals, with plans to expand to fitness, language learning, and creative projects.
• Key competitors: Habitica, Streaks; however, Project Cerebro’s unique AI-driven verification and adaptive accountability set it apart.
